    85â†’    // Serve index.html for directory requests
    86â†’    if (existsSync(filePath) && statSync(filePath).isDirectory()) {
    87â†’      filePath = join(filePath, 'index.html')
    88â†’    }
    89â†’
    90â†’    if (!existsSync(filePath)) {
    91â†’      res.writeHead(404, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' })
    92â†’      res.end('Not found')
    93â†’      return
    94â†’    }
    95â†’
    96â†’    const ext = extname(filePath)
    97â†’    const contentType = MIME[ext] ?? 'application/octet-stream'
    98â†’    res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': contentType })
    99â†’    const stream = createReadStream(filePath)
   100â†’    stream.on('error', () => { res.destroy() })
   101â†’    stream.pipe(res)
   102â†’  })
   103â†’
   104â†’  server.on('error', (err: NodeJS.ErrnoException) => {
   105â†’    if (err.code === 'EADDRINUSE') {
   106â†’      console.error(`Error: port ${port} is already in use.`)
   107â†’      process.exit(1)
   108â†’    }
   109â†’    console.error(`Server error: ${String(err)}`)
   110â†’    process.exit(1)
   111â†’  })
   112â†’
   113â†’  server.listen(port, () => {
   114â†’    console.log(`Serving ${root}`)
   115â†’    console.log(`Open: http://localhost:${port}/`)
   116â†’    console.log('Press Ctrl+C to stop.')
   117â†’  })
   118â†’
   119â†’  return 0
   120â†’}
   121â†’

1â†’/**
     2â†’ * CLI: memorytree daemon install|uninstall|run-once|watch|status
     3â†’ * Port of scripts/memorytree_daemon.py

     5â†’
     6â†’import { existsSync, mkdirSync, writeFileSync, unlinkSync } from 'node:fs'
     7â†’import { homedir } from 'node:os'
     8â†’import { resolve, dirname } from 'node:path'
     9â†’import { platform } from 'node:process'
    10â†’
    11â†’import { configPath, intervalToSeconds, loadConfig, saveConfig } from '../heartbeat/config.js'
    12â†’import { readLockPid } from '../heartbeat/lock.js'
    13â†’import { execCommand } from '../utils/exec.js'
    14â†’
    15â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    16â†’// Constants

    18â†’
    19â†’const TASK_NAME = 'MemoryTree Heartbeat'

    26â†’export function cmdInstall(options: { interval?: string; autoPush?: string }): number {
    27â†’  let config = loadConfig()
    28â†’
    29â†’  if (options.interval) {
    30â†’    config = { ...config, heartbeat_interval: options.interval }
    31â†’  }
    32â†’  if (options.autoPush) {
    33â†’    config = { ...config, auto_push: options.autoPush === 'true' }
    34â†’  }
    35â†’
    36â†’  saveConfig(config)
    37â†’  const seconds = intervalToSeconds(config.heartbeat_interval)
    38â†’  const scriptPath = heartbeatScriptPath()
    39â†’
    40â†’  const sys = platform
    41â†’  if (sys === 'linux') return installCron(scriptPath, seconds)
    42â†’  if (sys === 'darwin') return installLaunchd(scriptPath, seconds)
    43â†’  if (sys === 'win32') return installSchtasks(scriptPath, seconds)
    44â†’
    45â†’  process.stderr.write(`Unsupported platform: ${sys}\n`)
    46â†’  return 1
    47â†’}
    48â†’
    49â†’export function cmdUninstall(): number {
    50â†’  const sys = platform
    51â†’  if (sys === 'linux') return uninstallCron()
    52â†’  if (sys === 'darwin') return uninstallLaunchd()
    53â†’  if (sys === 'win32') return uninstallSchtasks()
    54â†’
    55â†’  process.stderr.write(`Unsupported platform: ${sys}\n`)
    56â†’  return 1
    57â†’}

    59â†’export async function cmdRunOnce(): Promise<number> {
    60â†’  const { main } = await import('../heartbeat/heartbeat.js')
    61â†’  return main()
    62â†’}
    63â†’
    64â†’export async function cmdWatch(options: { interval?: string }): Promise<number> {
    65â†’  const config = loadConfig()
    66â†’  const intervalStr = options.interval ?? config.heartbeat_interval
    67â†’  const seconds = intervalToSeconds(intervalStr)
    68â†’  const { main } = await import('../heartbeat/heartbeat.js')
    69â†’
    70â†’  process.stdout.write(`Watch mode: running heartbeat every ${seconds}s. Press Ctrl+C to stop.\n`)
    71â†’  try {
    72â†’    // eslint-disable-next-line no-constant-condition
    73â†’    while (true) {
    74â†’      await main()
    75â†’      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, seconds * 1000))
    76â†’    }
    77â†’  } catch {
    78â†’    process.stdout.write('\nWatch mode stopped.\n')
    79â†’  }
    80â†’  return 0
    81â†’}
    82â†’
    83â†’export function cmdStatus(): number {
    84â†’  const sys = platform
    85â†’
    86â†’  let registered = false
    87â†’  if (sys === 'linux') registered = isCronRegistered()
    88â†’  else if (sys === 'darwin') registered = isLaunchdRegistered()
    89â†’  else if (sys === 'win32') registered = isSchtasksRegistered()
    90â†’
    91â†’  const platformName = sys === 'darwin' ? 'Darwin' : sys === 'win32' ? 'Windows' : 'Linux'
    92â†’  process.stdout.write(`Platform:   ${platformName}\n`)
    93â†’  process.stdout.write(`Registered: ${registered ? 'yes' : 'no'}\n`)
    94â†’
    95â†’  const pid = readLockPid()
    96â†’  if (pid !== null) {
    97â†’    process.stdout.write(`Lock:       held by PID ${pid}\n`)
    98â†’  } else {
    99â†’    process.stdout.write('Lock:       not held\n')
   100â†’  }
   101â†’
   102â†’  if (existsSync(configPath())) {
   103â†’    const config = loadConfig()
   104â†’    process.stdout.write(`Interval:   ${config.heartbeat_interval}\n`)
   105â†’    process.stdout.write(`Auto-push:  ${config.auto_push}\n`)
   106â†’    process.stdout.write(`Projects:   ${config.projects.length}\n`)
   107â†’  } else {
   108â†’    process.stdout.write('Config:     not found (using defaults)\n')
   109â†’  }
   110â†’
   111â†’  return 0
   112â†’}

   114â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   115â†’// Linux (cron)
   116â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   117â†’
   118â†’function installCron(scriptPath: string, seconds: number): number {
   119â†’  if (isCronRegistered()) {
   120â†’    process.stderr.write("Heartbeat is already registered in cron. Use 'uninstall' first.\n")
   121â†’    return 1
   122â†’  }
   123â†’
   124â†’  const minutes = Math.max(1, Math.floor(seconds / 60))
   125â†’  const logDir = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'logs')
   126â†’  mkdirSync(logDir, { recursive: true })
   127â†’
   128â†’  const cronLine = `*/${minutes} * * * * node "${scriptPath}" daemon run-once >> "${resolve(logDir, 'heartbeat-cron.log')}" 2>&1 # memorytree`
   129â†’  const existing = getCrontab()
   130â†’  const newCrontab = existing.trim()
   131â†’    ? existing.trimEnd() + '\n' + cronLine + '\n'
   132â†’    : cronLine + '\n'
   133â†’
   134â†’  try {
   135â†’    const tmpFile = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', '.crontab.tmp')
   136â†’    writeFileSync(tmpFile, newCrontab)
   137â†’    execCommand('crontab', [tmpFile])
   138â†’    unlinkSync(tmpFile)
   139â†’  } catch {
   140â†’    process.stderr.write('Failed to install cron job.\n')
   141â†’    return 1
   142â†’  }
   143â†’
   144â†’  process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat registered in cron (every ${minutes}m).\n`)
   145â†’  return 0
   146â†’}
   147â†’
   148â†’function uninstallCron(): number {
   149â†’  const existing = getCrontab()
   150â†’  const filtered = existing.split('\n').filter(line => !line.includes('memorytree')).join('\n') + '\n'
   151â†’  try {
   152â†’    const tmpFile = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', '.crontab.tmp')
   153â†’    mkdirSync(dirname(tmpFile), { recursive: true })
   154â†’    writeFileSync(tmpFile, filtered)
   155â†’    execCommand('crontab', [tmpFile])
   156â†’    unlinkSync(tmpFile)
   157â†’  } catch {
   158â†’    // best effort
   159â†’  }
   160â†’  process.stdout.write('Heartbeat removed from cron.\n')
   161â†’  return 0
   162â†’}
   163â†’
   164â†’export function isCronRegistered(): boolean {
   165â†’  return getCrontab().includes('memorytree')
   166â†’}
   167â†’
   168â†’function getCrontab(): string {
   169â†’  try {
   170â†’    return execCommand('crontab', ['-l'], { allowFailure: true })
   171â†’  } catch {
   172â†’    return ''
   173â†’  }
   174â†’}

   176â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   177â†’// macOS (launchd)
   178â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   179â†’
   180â†’function launchdPlistPath(): string {
   181â†’  return resolve(homedir(), 'Library', 'LaunchAgents', `${LAUNCHD_LABEL}.plist`)
   182â†’}
   183â†’
   184â†’function installLaunchd(scriptPath: string, seconds: number): number {
   185â†’  const plistPath = launchdPlistPath()
   186â†’  if (existsSync(plistPath)) {
   187â†’    process.stderr.write("Heartbeat plist already exists. Use 'uninstall' first.\n")
   188â†’    return 1
   189â†’  }
   190â†’
   191â†’  const logDir = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'logs')
   192â†’  mkdirSync(logDir, { recursive: true })
   193â†’
   194â†’  const plistContent = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
   195â†’<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
   196â†’<plist version="1.0">
   197â†’<dict>
   198â†’    <key>Label</key>
   199â†’    <string>${LAUNCHD_LABEL}</string>
   200â†’    <key>ProgramArguments</key>
   201â†’    <array>
   202â†’        <string>node</string>
   203â†’        <string>${scriptPath}</string>
   204â†’        <string>daemon</string>
   205â†’        <string>run-once</string>
   206â†’    </array>
   207â†’    <key>StartInterval</key>
   208â†’    <integer>${seconds}</integer>
   209â†’    <key>StandardOutPath</key>
   210â†’    <string>${resolve(logDir, 'heartbeat-launchd.log')}</string>
   211â†’    <key>StandardErrorPath</key>
   212â†’    <string>${resolve(logDir, 'heartbeat-launchd.log')}</string>
   213â†’</dict>
   214â†’</plist>
   215â†’`
   216â†’  mkdirSync(dirname(plistPath), { recursive: true })
   217â†’  writeFileSync(plistPath, plistContent, 'utf-8')
   218â†’
   219â†’  try {
   220â†’    execCommand('launchctl', ['load', plistPath])
   221â†’  } catch {
   222â†’    process.stderr.write('Failed to load plist.\n')
   223â†’    return 1
   224â†’  }
   225â†’
   226â†’  process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat registered via launchd (every ${seconds}s).\n`)
   227â†’  return 0
   228â†’}
   229â†’
   230â†’function uninstallLaunchd(): number {
   231â†’  const plistPath = launchdPlistPath()
   232â†’  if (existsSync(plistPath)) {
   233â†’    try { execCommand('launchctl', ['unload', plistPath], { allowFailure: true }) } catch { /* ignore */ }
   234â†’    try { unlinkSync(plistPath) } catch { /* ignore */ }
   235â†’  }
   236â†’  process.stdout.write('Heartbeat removed from launchd.\n')
   237â†’  return 0
   238â†’}
   239â†’
   240â†’export function isLaunchdRegistered(): boolean {
   241â†’  return existsSync(launchdPlistPath())

   244â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   245â†’// Windows (Task Scheduler)
   246â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   247â†’
   248â†’// Write a VBScript launcher that runs node silently (no console window).
   249â†’// wscript.exe /B runs in batch mode (suppresses script error popups).
   250â†’// VBScript Run(..., 0, False): 0 = SW_HIDE hides the window; False = fire-and-forget.
   251â†’// Written as UTF-16 LE with BOM so wscript.exe handles non-ASCII paths (e.g. Chinese
   252â†’// usernames) correctly on all Windows versions.
   253â†’export function vbsLauncherPath(): string {
   254â†’  return resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'heartbeat-launcher.vbs')
   255â†’}
   256â†’
   257â†’export function writeVbsLauncher(scriptPath: string): string {
   258â†’  const vbsPath = vbsLauncherPath()
   259â†’  mkdirSync(dirname(vbsPath), { recursive: true })
   260â†’  // Inside VBScript strings, double-quote is escaped as ""
   261â†’  const escapedScript = scriptPath.replace(/"/g, '""')
   262â†’  // Use the full node binary path so the launcher works even when Task Scheduler's
   263â†’  // PATH differs from the user's shell (e.g. nvm/fnm environments).
   264â†’  const escapedNode = process.execPath.replace(/"/g, '""')
   265â†’  const content = [
   266â†’    'Set WshShell = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")',
   267â†’    `WshShell.Run """${escapedNode}"" ""${escapedScript}"" daemon run-once", 0, False`,
   268â†’  ].join('\r\n') + '\r\n'
   269â†’  // UTF-16 LE BOM: recognised by wscript.exe on all Windows versions and preserves
   270â†’  // non-ASCII characters (e.g. Chinese home directory paths) without corruption.
   271â†’  const buf = Buffer.concat([Buffer.from([0xff, 0xfe]), Buffer.from(content, 'utf16le')])
   272â†’  writeFileSync(vbsPath, buf)
   273â†’  return vbsPath
   274â†’}
   275â†’
   276â†’function installSchtasks(scriptPath: string, seconds: number): number {
   277â†’  if (isSchtasksRegistered()) {
   278â†’    process.stderr.write("Heartbeat is already registered in Task Scheduler. Use 'uninstall' first.\n")
   279â†’    return 1
   280â†’  }
   281â†’
   282â†’  const minutes = Math.max(1, Math.floor(seconds / 60))
   283â†’  const vbsPath = writeVbsLauncher(scriptPath)
   284â†’  const trCommand = `wscript.exe /B "${vbsPath}"`
   285â†’
   286â†’  try {
   287â†’    execCommand('schtasks', [
   288â†’      '/create', '/tn', TASK_NAME, '/sc', 'minute', '/mo', String(minutes),
   289â†’      '/tr', trCommand, '/f',
   290â†’    ])
   291â†’  } catch {
   292â†’    // schtasks failed â€” remove the launcher file we just wrote to keep state clean
   293â†’    try { unlinkSync(vbsPath) } catch { /* ignore */ }
   294â†’    process.stderr.write('Failed to create scheduled task.\n')
   295â†’    return 1
   296â†’  }
   297â†’
   298â†’  process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat registered in Task Scheduler (every ${minutes}m).\n`)
   299â†’  return 0
   300â†’}
   301â†’
   302â†’function uninstallSchtasks(): number {
   303â†’  try {
   304â†’    execCommand('schtasks', ['/delete', '/tn', TASK_NAME, '/f'], { allowFailure: true })
   305â†’  } catch {
   306â†’    // best effort
   307â†’  }
   308â†’  const vbsPath = vbsLauncherPath()
   309â†’  if (existsSync(vbsPath)) {
   310â†’    try { unlinkSync(vbsPath) } catch { /* ignore */ }
   311â†’  }
   312â†’  process.stdout.write('Heartbeat removed from Task Scheduler.\n')
   313â†’  return 0
   314â†’}
   315â†’
   316â†’export function isSchtasksRegistered(): boolean {
   317â†’  try {
   318â†’    execCommand('schtasks', ['/query', '/tn', TASK_NAME])
   319â†’    return true
   320â†’  } catch {
   321â†’    return false
   322â†’  }
   323â†’}

   326â†’// Helpers
   327â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   328â†’
   329â†’export function heartbeatScriptPath(): string {
   330â†’  // Use process.argv[1] which is the actual script being executed,
   331â†’  // more reliable than import.meta.url which varies between tsx and bundled output
   332â†’  const scriptArg = process.argv[1] ?? ''
   333â†’  if (scriptArg && scriptArg.endsWith('cli.js')) {
   334â†’    return resolve(scriptArg)
   335â†’  }
   336â†’  // Fallback: resolve relative to import.meta.url
   337â†’  const urlPath = new URL(import.meta.url).pathname.replace(/^\/([a-zA-Z]:)/, '$1')
   338â†’  return resolve(dirname(urlPath), '..', '..', 'dist', 'cli.js')
   339â†’}

1â†’/**

     5â†’
     6â†’import { existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'
     7â†’import { homedir } from 'node:os'

    10â†’import { parse as parseToml } from 'smol-toml'

    12â†’import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
    13â†’
    14â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    15â†’// Constants

    18â†’const DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL = '5m'
    19â†’const DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH = true
    20â†’const DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL = 'info'
    21â†’const DEFAULT_GENERATE_REPORT = false
    22â†’const DEFAULT_AI_SUMMARY_MODEL = 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'

    29â†’
    30â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

    39â†’export interface Config {

    55â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

    59â†’export function memorytreeRoot(): string {

    67â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    68â†’// Load / Save

    70â†’
    71â†’export function loadConfig(): Config {
    72â†’  const path = configPath()
    73â†’  if (!existsSync(path)) {
    74â†’    return defaultConfig()
    75â†’  }
    76â†’  let raw: Record<string, unknown>
    77â†’  try {
    78â†’    const text = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
    79â†’    raw = parseToml(text) as Record<string, unknown>
    80â†’  } catch {
    81â†’    return defaultConfig()
    82â†’  }
    83â†’  return parseRaw(raw)
    84â†’}
    85â†’
    86â†’export function saveConfig(cfg: Config): void {
    87â†’  const path = configPath()
    88â†’  mkdirSync(dirname(path), { recursive: true })
    89â†’
    90â†’  const lines: string[] = [
    91â†’    `heartbeat_interval = ${tomlString(cfg.heartbeat_interval)}`,
    92â†’    `auto_push = ${cfg.auto_push ? 'true' : 'false'}`,
    93â†’    `log_level = ${tomlString(cfg.log_level)}`,
    94â†’    `generate_report = ${cfg.generate_report ? 'true' : 'false'}`,
    95â†’    `ai_summary_model = ${tomlString(cfg.ai_summary_model)}`,
    96â†’    `locale = ${tomlString(cfg.locale ?? DEFAULT_LOCALE)}`,
    97â†’    `gh_pages_branch = ${tomlString(cfg.gh_pages_branch ?? DEFAULT_GH_PAGES_BRANCH)}`,
    98â†’    `cname = ${tomlString(cfg.cname ?? DEFAULT_CNAME)}`,
    99â†’    `webhook_url = ${tomlString(cfg.webhook_url ?? DEFAULT_WEBHOOK_URL)}`,
   100â†’    `report_base_url = ${tomlString(cfg.report_base_url ?? DEFAULT_REPORT_BASE_URL)}`,
   101â†’  ]
   102â†’
   103â†’  if (cfg.watch_dirs.length > 0) {
   104â†’    const items = cfg.watch_dirs.map(d => tomlString(d)).join(', ')
   105â†’    lines.push(`watch_dirs = [${items}]`)
   106â†’  } else {
   107â†’    lines.push('watch_dirs = []')
   108â†’  }
   109â†’
   110â†’  lines.push('')
   111â†’  for (const project of cfg.projects) {
   112â†’    lines.push('[[projects]]')
   113â†’    lines.push(`path = ${tomlString(project.path)}`)
   114â†’    if (project.name) {
   115â†’      lines.push(`name = ${tomlString(project.name)}`)
   116â†’    }
   117â†’    lines.push('')
   118â†’  }
   119â†’
   120â†’  writeFileSync(path, lines.join('\n') + '\n', 'utf-8')
   121â†’}
   122â†’
   123â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   124â†’// Interval parsing
   125â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   126â†’
   127â†’export function intervalToSeconds(interval: string): number {
   128â†’  const match = interval.trim().toLowerCase().match(/^(\d+)\s*(s|m|h)$/)
   129â†’  if (!match) {
   130â†’    return intervalToSeconds(DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)
   131â†’  }
   132â†’  const value = parseInt(match[1]!, 10)
   133â†’  const unit = match[2]!
   134â†’  if (value <= 0) {
   135â†’    return intervalToSeconds(DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)
   136â†’  }
   137â†’  const multiplier: Record<string, number> = { s: 1, m: 60, h: 3600 }
   138â†’  return value * (multiplier[unit] ?? 60)
   139â†’}
   140â†’
   141â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   142â†’// Project registration
   143â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   144â†’
   145â†’export function registerProject(cfg: Config, repoPath: string): Config {
   146â†’  const resolved = toPosixPath(resolve(repoPath))
   147â†’  for (const entry of cfg.projects) {
   148â†’    if (toPosixPath(resolve(entry.path)) === resolved) {
   149â†’      return cfg
   150â†’    }
   151â†’  }
   152â†’  const name = resolved.split('/').pop() ?? ''
   153â†’  return {
   154â†’    ...cfg,
   155â†’    projects: [...cfg.projects, { path: resolved, name }],
   156â†’  }
   157â†’}

   159â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   160â†’// Internal helpers
   161â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   162â†’
   163â†’function defaultConfig(): Config {
   164â†’  return {
   165â†’    heartbeat_interval: DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL,
   166â†’    watch_dirs: [],
   167â†’    projects: [],
   168â†’    auto_push: DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH,
   169â†’    log_level: DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL,
   170â†’    generate_report: DEFAULT_GENERATE_REPORT,
   171â†’    ai_summary_model: DEFAULT_AI_SUMMARY_MODEL,
   172â†’    locale: DEFAULT_LOCALE,
   173â†’    gh_pages_branch: DEFAULT_GH_PAGES_BRANCH,
   174â†’    cname: DEFAULT_CNAME,
   175â†’    webhook_url: DEFAULT_WEBHOOK_URL,
   176â†’    report_base_url: DEFAULT_REPORT_BASE_URL,
   177â†’  }
   178â†’}
   179â†’
   180â†’function parseRaw(raw: Record<string, unknown>): Config {
   181â†’  let interval = raw['heartbeat_interval']
   182â†’  if (typeof interval !== 'string' || !isValidInterval(interval)) {
   183â†’    interval = DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL
   184â†’  }
   185â†’
   186â†’  let autoPush = raw['auto_push']
   187â†’  if (typeof autoPush !== 'boolean') {
   188â†’    autoPush = DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH
   189â†’  }
   190â†’
   191â†’  let logLevel = raw['log_level']
   192â†’  if (typeof logLevel !== 'string' || !VALID_LOG_LEVELS.has(logLevel.toLowerCase())) {
   193â†’    logLevel = DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL
   194â†’  }
   195â†’  logLevel = (logLevel as string).toLowerCase()
   196â†’
   197â†’  const watchDirs: string[] = []
   198â†’  const rawDirs = raw['watch_dirs']
   199â†’  if (Array.isArray(rawDirs)) {
   200â†’    for (const d of rawDirs) {
   201â†’      if (typeof d === 'string') watchDirs.push(d)
   202â†’    }
   203â†’  }
   204â†’
   205â†’  const projects: ProjectEntry[] = []
   206â†’  const rawProjects = raw['projects']
   207â†’  if (Array.isArray(rawProjects)) {
   208â†’    for (const entry of rawProjects) {
   209â†’      if (entry !== null && typeof entry === 'object' && !Array.isArray(entry)) {
   210â†’        const rec = entry as Record<string, unknown>
   211â†’        if (typeof rec['path'] === 'string') {
   212â†’          projects.push({
   213â†’            path: rec['path'] as string,
   214â†’            name: String(rec['name'] ?? ''),
   215â†’          })
   216â†’        }
   217â†’      }
   218â†’    }
   219â†’  }
   220â†’
   221â†’  let generateReport = raw['generate_report']
   222â†’  if (typeof generateReport !== 'boolean') {
   223â†’    generateReport = DEFAULT_GENERATE_REPORT
   224â†’  }
   225â†’
   226â†’  let aiSummaryModel = raw['ai_summary_model']
   227â†’  if (typeof aiSummaryModel !== 'string' || !aiSummaryModel) {
   228â†’    aiSummaryModel = DEFAULT_AI_SUMMARY_MODEL
   229â†’  }
   230â†’
   231â†’  let locale = raw['locale']
   232â†’  if (typeof locale !== 'string' || !locale) {
   233â†’    locale = DEFAULT_LOCALE
   234â†’  }
   235â†’
   236â†’  let ghPagesBranch = raw['gh_pages_branch']
   237â†’  if (typeof ghPagesBranch !== 'string') {
   238â†’    ghPagesBranch = DEFAULT_GH_PAGES_BRANCH
   239â†’  }
   240â†’
   241â†’  let cname = raw['cname']
   242â†’  if (typeof cname !== 'string') {
   243â†’    cname = DEFAULT_CNAME
   244â†’  }
   245â†’
   246â†’  let webhookUrl = raw['webhook_url']
   247â†’  if (typeof webhookUrl !== 'string') {
   248â†’    webhookUrl = DEFAULT_WEBHOOK_URL
   249â†’  }
   250â†’
   251â†’  let reportBaseUrl = raw['report_base_url']
   252â†’  if (typeof reportBaseUrl !== 'string') {
   253â†’    reportBaseUrl = DEFAULT_REPORT_BASE_URL
   254â†’  }
   255â†’
   256â†’  return {
   257â†’    heartbeat_interval: interval as string,
   258â†’    watch_dirs: watchDirs,
   259â†’    projects,
   260â†’    auto_push: autoPush as boolean,
   261â†’    log_level: logLevel as string,
   262â†’    generate_report: generateReport as boolean,
   263â†’    ai_summary_model: aiSummaryModel as string,
   264â†’    locale: locale as string,
   265â†’    gh_pages_branch: ghPagesBranch as string,
   266â†’    cname: cname as string,
   267â†’    webhook_url: webhookUrl as string,
   268â†’    report_base_url: reportBaseUrl as string,
   269â†’  }
   270â†’}
   271â†’
   272â†’function isValidInterval(value: string): boolean {
   273â†’  const match = value.trim().toLowerCase().match(/^(\d+)\s*(s|m|h)$/)
   274â†’  if (!match) return false
   275â†’  return parseInt(match[1]!, 10) > 0
   276â†’}
   277â†’
   278â†’function tomlString(value: string): string {
   279â†’  const escaped = value.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\"')
   280â†’  return `"${escaped}"`
   281â†’}
